"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "## Summary

When SimpleAsyncHTTPClient follows a 3xx redirect, it shallow-copies the original HTTPRequest, rewrites the URL, decrements max_redirects, and removes only the Host header. It does not clear Authorization, auth_username, auth_password, or auth_mode when the redirect target changes origin.

As a result, credentials intended for one origin can be forwarded to a different origin when follow_redirects=True, which is the default.

Beginning in Tornado 6.5.6, `SimpleAsyncHTTPClient` matches the default behavior of `libcurl` (and therefore `CurlAsyncHTTPClient`): When a redirect changes the scheme, host, or port of the url, the `Authorization` and `Cookie` headers will be removed when following the redirect.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00486, "percentile": 0.38618}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3x9g-8vmp-wqvf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-15T20:20:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3x9g-8vmp-wqvf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3x9g-8vmp-wqvf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49853"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-15T20:20:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/tornadoweb/tornado/security/advisories/GHSA-3x9g-8vmp-wqvf", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3x9g-8vmp-wqvf"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/tornadoweb/tornado/security-advisories/GHSA-3x9g-8vmp-wqvf", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/tornadoweb/tornado", "summary": "Tornado: Authorization header forwarded across cross-origin redirects in SimpleAsyncHTTPClient", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-15T20:20:20Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3x9g-8vmp-wqvf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.5.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "tornado"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.5.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Tornado: Authorization header forwarded across cross-origin redirects in SimpleAsyncHTTPClient
